text:
Taba City (, Taba-shi) is a city located in the Republic of East Gorteau. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 234 

Overview

The city of Taba is one of the locations that Killua planned to head to warn its residents of Ming Jol-ik's genocidal plan. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

After finishing his warning to the residents of the last city about Ming Jol-ik's genocidal plan, Killua planned to head to Taba City that was 40km (25 mi.) from his current position. 

References
